title: Sony sued Udio again over 30,000 songs, and turned its rivals’ AI deals into a weapon
summary: The heart of the case is fair use, the defence Udio leans on to justify training on unlicensed songs. After gaining access to Udio’s training data, Sony says audio fingerprinting matched hundreds of thousands of its recordings.
caption: output/2026-07-21/sony-sued-udio-again-over-30-000-songs-and-turned-its-rivals-ai-deals-.txt
